{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204450315C2B31D95C58E3B8EE9"}"},"total":1196},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594517703413842712","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一天追完了，整体打分满分10分7-8分，无雷电无太多毒点，缺点就是爽点爆发太集中了，看多了容易疲劳，甚至会有一种爽文没有日常看起来舒服，整体上是可以的如果可以控制一下爽点别太密集就更好了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768243177,"group_id":"7564779844639149118","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Fe/2K8GD6gRCkeAzgHi5E=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d4b022aab02941faaf595c22b4ee6414~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705755&x-signature=lUm9sWkTXAjZD0Q7V3iPqbmWKsY%3D","user_id":"439435100426311","user_name":"58岁妇女杀手"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"439435100426311","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7564779844639149118","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统都市文】
何欢从宿醉中惊醒，竟发现自己重生回到2007年的高三教室。曾经的百亿老总，此刻却是全班成绩倒数第一的网瘾少年，面对班主任的怒吼和同学的哄笑，他猛然清醒——这不是梦，是上天给的弥补遗憾的机会。
更幸运的是，他身上还多了一张上辈子的银行卡，里面有着一亿现金。
这一世，他要打脸，要装逼，要扮猪吃老虎。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/06fb811c4704b44b3e890ddde4dbcb8e","author":"番茄二月初二","author_id":"","book_id":"7564779844639149118","book_name":"带着一亿现金重生贫困的高中时代","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7564779848611152446","read_count":"173361","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"600626"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"288","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,神豪,重生,扮猪吃虎,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0ce493040f980f8a2e1bf738b4fea040~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309903&x-signature=917jHpk9MtvLLXvSP9Bc2EH%2FQEU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111112772715","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"168"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204450315C2B31D95C58E3B8EE9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":22,"forwarded_count":0,"liste
